Encryption Details
Classical Encryption
AES-256-GCM authenticated encryption
Post-Quantum
CRYSTALS-Kyber-1024 (NIST PQC standard)
Key Derivation
Argon2id — 64 MB, 3 iterations, 4 threads
Tamper Detection
HMAC-SHA256 over entire vault file
Key Rotation
Fresh entry key generated on every update
Vault Format
.qvault v2 — encrypted binary, no plaintext fields
Cypheria
Version 0.1.0  ·  Quantum-Resistant Password Manager
Post-Quantum Encryption

Dual-path protection using CRYSTALS-Kyber-1024 (NIST PQC standard) alongside AES-256-GCM. Your vault stays safe even against future quantum computers.

Zero Network Access

Completely offline. No telemetry, no cloud sync, no analytics. Your credentials never touch a server. The vault file lives only on your machine.

Argon2id Key Derivation

OWASP-compliant KDF with 64 MB memory cost, 3 iterations, and 4-thread parallelism. Defeats GPU and ASIC brute-force attacks on your master password.

Per-Entry Key Rotation

Every update generates a fresh Entry Key. Old snapshots of the vault cannot decrypt updated entries — forward secrecy baked into every save.

Auto-Clear Clipboard

Copied passwords are overwritten with random noise then cleared automatically. Clipboard history managers won't retain your credentials past the timeout.

Encrypted Secure Notes

Store sensitive text — recovery codes, API keys, private notes — encrypted with the same AES-256-GCM + unique Note Key architecture as entries.

Technical Stack
Rust + Tauri 2.x
CRYSTALS-Kyber-1024
AES-256-GCM
Argon2id KDF
HMAC-SHA256 Integrity
Zero network, zero cloud
Built with care. No ads. No tracking. No compromises.
Your data belongs to you — always.
